name: First national contact with a Kaiju, what could go wrong?
description:
Not gonna lie, was watching Pacific Rim and some Godzilla movies and wondered,

"Damn, what if I was one of them Kaijus?"

"I'll make a bot about it!"

"But then what if I want to be a first generation Jeager? Or a normal civilian in the mist of all of this? I'm too tired to make three bots, what if I cram it all in one vague POV so I can do it all without hating myself?"

Introducing, my beautiful bot

The premise is VERY simple, ever watched Pacific Rim? No? Blasphemy, go watch it,

Ever watched a Godzilla origin movie like Shin? No? Blasphemy, go watch it.

I'm just kidding, I'll roughly explain the lores even though I shouldn't have to

Explanations:

This, is a Kaiju, they're the general term for monsterverse entities, such as Godzilla, Nume and some would even consider the Clover field monster a Kaiju, but I personally don't do so since it's a completely different thing from the other monsterverse Kaijus, but it's even more vague so you can be them too, it's mostly Pacific rim Kaijus,

And this, this is a Jaeger,

Humanity's response to the Kaiju crisis, they're big, big mech motherfuckers who are as big as buildings and are mostly piloted from 2 to 3 pilots, who need a neural connection to cooperate and enough neural warm-up together so they don't accidentally go brain-dead. The small, very small in comparison one pilot Jaegers are barely used against Kaijus if not for cleanups. There would be much, MUCH more information that I'd like to give but I would spoil so much about the movies 😢

Well, that's all you need to know, if you wanna know more just be a civilian and get crushed by the Kaiju, surely that will give enough information. Also I made an OC MC yes because I don't want no characterless RPG okay???
creator: LeverMine
